effort_complexity.rationale: Known-shape provider addition (xAI is OpenAI-compatible) mirroring existing in-process prefixes — registry registration + provider config + catalog/pricing wiring. Breadth across a few files, low depth. The one unknown (structured-output wire quirk) is contained by the driver contract and resolved at design (xAI honours OpenAI strict json_schema).

design_decisions.description: Reuse the shared in-process oai chat driver (join chatPrefixes) rather than adding a new registry Entry or driver type for xai/.
design_decisions.rationale: xAI is OpenAI chat/completions-compatible; joining chatPrefixes is the established sibling pattern (deepseek/groq/mistral/openrouter). Reversible and local — no new Entry, no new driver type. Roles (implementer/verifier/captain) are inherited from the shared NewOAIChat instance.

design_decisions.description: xai/ uses StructuredResponseFormat (native strict json_schema), not StructuredToolCall.
design_decisions.rationale: xAI supports the exact OpenAI strict json_schema response_format shape (docs.x.ai structured-outputs) — identical to the openai-completions mode. Fallback to StructuredToolCall is a one-token change if a live wire quirk surfaces (driver-contract containment). Local, reversible.

design_decisions.description: New xaiPricing map wired into PriceForModel, not an entry in the OpenAI modelPricing map.
design_decisions.rationale: Follows the per-provider-map convention (anthropicPricing/googlePricing/bedrockPricing); keeps grok rates out of the OpenAI table. Local, reversible.

design_decisions.description: Canonical XAI_API_KEY honoured (via envOrAlias with SWORN_XAI_API_KEY fallback) on both the registry/loop path (ProviderConfigFromEnv) AND the one-shot FromEnv utility path.
design_decisions.rationale: ProviderConfigFromEnv already uses envOrAlias; adding a FromEnv case 'xai' keeps the utility path consistent (its default case reads SWORN_-only). Matches the existing google/openai carve-outs. Local, reversible.

reachability_artifacts: cli-run: XAI_API_KEY=sk-smoke-test sworn capabilities -> oai-inprocess lists xai/ prefix, roles implementer,verifier,captain, available: yes - API keys present: xai/; no key -> xai/ listed, available: no
cli-run: sworn models --provider zzz -> 'valid providers: ..., openrouter, xai'

httptest: TestXAI_ChatStructured_ResponseFormat drives ChatStructured through the NewClient-resolved xai client (strict json_schema, no live dispatch); TestResolveXAIRoles, TestCapabilitiesListsXAI, TestPricing_Grok45, TestCatalogProviderNames

open_deferrals.item: Confirm exact grok-4.5 published per-1M pricing (placeholder = xAI Grok flagship $3/$15, 2026-07-12 snapshot).
open_deferrals.acknowledgement: Recorded in proof.json not_delivered and journal.md; filed as GitHub issue sworn#99. AC-04 requires only a real non-zero entry (delivered); exact-rate accuracy is pricing-snapshot maintenance beyond this slice (spec R-4).
